<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>type 1 diabetes mellitus（99.5%）</li>
<li>thiamine-responsive dysfunction syndrome（99.5%）</li>
<li>diabetes mellitus (disease)（99.5%）</li>
<li>opsismodysplasia（99.5%）</li>
<li>focal stiff limb syndrome（99.5%）</li>
<li>classic stiff person syndrome（99.5%）</li>
<li>autoimmune oophoritis（99.4%）</li>
<li>pancreatic agenesis（99.2%）</li>
<li>drug-induced localized lipodystrophy（99.2%）</li>
<li>centrifugal lipodystrophy（99.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
